published_prior_art.cite: Hahn1998Econometrica / HiranoImbensRidder2003Econometrica / ChernozhukovEtAl2018ECTJ / ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022ADML: common ATE EIF/AIPW-Riesz baseline

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform_v1: weak-overlap studentization/projection frontier, not the fixed-overlap CEINR-admissible LRO normalization iff

published_prior_art.cite: Newey1994Econometrica + Hahn1998Econometrica + ChernozhukovEscancianoIchimuraNeweyRobins2022LRO: canonical-gradient/GMM theory makes IF equivalence reduce to the residual loading; the CEINR-dictionary subclass is not separately classified

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform_v1 requested explicit finite-support/projection arithmetic but did not contain this fixed-overlap intercept-loading diagnostic

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship: the §8 claim that the rho_J=0 boundary is sharper than the tautological alpha_J=alpha_0 condition overstates the gap, since rho_J is just the normalized L2(nu) squared distance; flagship repair needs a primitive CEINR-dictionary characterization not already implied by canonical-gradient uniqueness.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The optimal-weight clause invokes Assumption optimal-lro but the leading hypothesis range is only ass:ate-model--ass:lro-report; add an explicit conditional on ass:optimal-lro.

soundness_flags.label: Diagnostic 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The theorem assumes ass:noncancel, whose content is Delta_J>0, while also concluding Delta_{J^dagger}>0; remove the noncancellation premise and let the two-cell arithmetic prove it.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the current rho=0 restatement with primitive necessary-and-sufficient conditions on CEINR admissible dictionaries, Jacobians, and weights that can be checked before forming alpha_J.

Add a named nontrivial CEINR-admissible overidentified ATE dictionary where optimal GMM weighting fails or succeeds, rather than only the just-identified Riesz normalization and non-admissible intercept diagnostic.
Make the flagship comparison explicitly against Newey/Hahn canonical-gradient uniqueness: state exactly what remains after that general theorem is applied.

recommended_next_step: Revise Conjecture 1 into a non-tautological primitive CEINR-admissible normalization theorem and patch the two assumption-coherence issues.
